raw_text: good app, but when it comes to queries customer care is not available on phone. there is a wastage of time with the message exchanging in the app. for me I ordered some products in the first attempt money was debited from my account but still it showed retry payment. hence I hv again made payment and both the orders have come which hv now doubled items . pls take the double orders items back. also in both the orders we found cockroaches running in the bags.

Honestly, it's 2026 and still no Cash on Delivery? It’s incredibly frustrating to have a cart ready only to realize I can't pay the way I want. Not everyone wants to rely on digital transactions for every single quick order. Huge letdown for such a major service. other apps are better than this. really disappointed

I received expired rice from Blinkit, and it was completely rotten and full of insects. When I filed a complaint, they refused to give me a refund. Instead, they issued a replacement, but they delivered the exact same expired product again! After that, they provided absolutely no solution, even after I emailed them. This is an utterly pathetic app; nobody should ever order anything from it

This app is completely secure and if we are unable to go anywhere, we can get groceries delivered to our doorstep by just blinking it. This app is absolutely helpful; there are no problems with it. We can order groceries or other essential items from anywhere and at any time. And finally, thank you Blinkit, you made everything easy.

I love the app. One suggestion, I would like to mention is please try to name the store from which our products are coming from. sometimes, the delivery becomes unsuccessful, because the phone number becomes unreachable sometimes, so that way when it is getting returned to the store, we can pick it up from the store itself. Happened with me today, and realized store name is important. I would be obliged if you do a little correction. Thank you😊

App is ok occasional issue while applying voucher codes, but the problem is I always see surge price of 30rs after 5pm evening. although they say delivery is free they collect it through surge fee most of the time. to avoid that you have to order atleast 500. secondly, on comparing with other widely used platforms most of the product rates are usually higher by 10-15% from other platforms. So not a great experience overall.

Worst experience with Blinkit. The delivery partner handed over an incomplete order with a missing item and still collected the full payment. The missing item was clearly not in the package. Now, instead of resolving the issue immediately, Blinkit is asking me to wait 7 days for a refund. I paid for a product that I never received. Completely unacceptable service and very disappointing customer experience.

it's totally a life saver and I wanted to share an experience I had the exam early in the morning and i forgot to print the admit card and i remember it was around 11:30 pm and here blinkit saved my life . and they really don't have minimum value for that It was a wonderful experience using the app every time as compared to other apps It was easy nice and never had any issues .

Really good service. sometimes we all need to order something immediately due to some emergency. sometimes we need order at night and other times its just for choice. they deliver quick, and have no hassle... If I have to change something, I would ask them to increase product stock so they are not out of stock

This sports system application is very, very poor. It crashes every single time I try to open it or look at the game scores. The loading times are incredibly slow, and half the features don't even work. I missed the entire live stream because the app kept freezing. Do not waste your time downloading this garbage. and one more thing they theft items from ordered products

It's nice, I was a office visit and had to give some gift, ordered instantly.... Update 19 May: Reducing 4 stars to 3, Failed payment, ordered again, got two orders, it's okay, but I don't get perfect bills for reimbursement..., means the real payment and the amount on the bills are different, instead I'll buy from mart...

> I ordered a polyester luggage bag organiser from Blinkit, but they delivered the wrong product. I returned it multiple times (2–3 times), yet each replacement was incorrect. After repeated issues, the support team advised me to opt for a refund. However, despite following their instructions, I still have not received my refund. > > This has been a very frustrating experience. I expected a quick resolution, but neither the correct product nor the refund has been provided. I re

I've placed an order , and the quality of the product is not good at all.. so the product has an option of 7 day replacement period. so I tried to replace the product so that atleast I could get a better one. but it's been 4 days , I've been trying to replace the product, contacted through the app as well through the mail but the response is ZERO. worst customer service app ever. TOTALLY TRASH

Absolutely worstest experience for refund An order placed on the Blinkit app was cancelled on the 18th; however, I have not yet received a refund for the amount I paid. When I reached out to Blinkit Support, the automated response stated that I would receive the refund within 6 to 7 days; however, 14 days have now passed, and the amount has not yet been credited to my account.

I’ve been using the Blinkit app for quite some time, and the experience has been amazing. The delivery is super fast, the app interface is easy to use, and the products are usually fresh and well-packed. I also like the wide variety of groceries, snacks, household items, and daily essentials available. The delivery partners are polite, and customer support is helpful whenever needed. Overall, Blinkit makes shopping very convenient and saves a lot of time. Highly recommended!

I had once rated this app with 5 stars in 2002, but today I am extremely disappointed with their service and customer care. I purchased a mixer box which was delivered without the juicer. Despite raising the issue and escalating, no solution was provided. This is a clear case of cheating, and I have lost my hard‑earned money on a product that was not delivered as promised. The customer support experience has been third‑class and unacceptable.

Pathetic service from @letsblinkit! I’ve been a loyal user for a long time, but for the past 2 days, I can't place any orders due to a continuous "payment method not available" error. I even added money to my Blinkit wallet, but it's still blocked. Reinstalling the app didn't fix it. Worst part? The help centre is totally useless with only 5 pre-selected options and no real human support. My money is completely stuck now—can't order, can't withdraw. Fix this glitch ASAP!

Very bad experience with Blinkit app. I have been trying to make payments using Google Pay, PhonePe, and Blinkit Money, but it always shows a technical error. This issue has been there for the last 10–12 days. There is also no option to contact customer support in the app. Feels like they only focus on selling and earning, but not on helping customers. Very disappointing.

Very poor service. I received an expired product, and there was no refund provided. They also gave me a promo code, but there were no instructions on how to redeem it, and I couldn't find any option to use it. Overall, a very disappointing experience. Third-class service. The product delivered was expired, and no refund was provided. I was given a promo code, but there was no information on how to redeem.

Overall, Blinkit is an amazing app. It provides extraordinary service. It always delivers the correct items, it's delivery partner's are mostly kind, it provides a variety of products and the app presents punctual and updated timings. I would have given it a 5 star review but I rated it 4 stars because Blinkit charges delivery charges unlike Zepto. Nevertheless it is still acceptable for its amazing service.
